channel.title: No handles has matched for links using "tel:" and "mailto:"
channel.description:
Hello,
I am getting an error on links where im using "tel:" and "mailto:". They are created in Gutenberg and work as expected but the following error still shows in the console: `ServerError: No handler has matched for the given link`

item.title: No handles has matched for links using "tel:" and "mailto:"
item.dc:creator: mburridge
item.description:
Hi @adam

Welcome to the Frontity community.

Thanks for raising this, as after some investigation it turns out to be a bug in the Frontity codebase.

We’ve raised an issue to address this.

Read full topic
item.source: No handles has matched for links using "tel:" and "mailto:"

item.title: No handles has matched for links using "tel:" and "mailto:"
item.dc:creator: adam
item.description:
Hello,

I am getting an error on links where im using “tel:” and “mailto:”. They are created in Gutenberg and work as expected but the following error still shows in the console:
ServerError: No handler has matched for the given link

Read full topic
item.source: No handles has matched for links using "tel:" and "mailto:"
